title: Completed Online Event: Student Diversity Webinar with Alumni
text: "Student diversity" online event Event Status: Completed Date & Time: July 25, 2025 7:00 PM IST Recommended for: Offer holders and potential applicants Book now Join us for a webinar on “Student-Centred Diversity”, featuring three accomplished University of Southampton alumni as they share their unique journeys. The session will feature Bhavna Sharma, Alumna, MA Luxury Brand Management, Avani Desai, Alumna, BSc Business Management with a Placement Year, and Dibyayan Ghosh, Alumnus, BSc Accounting and Finance with a year in employment. The webinar is scheduled for Friday, 25 July 2025 from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM (IST).
summary: This completed online event, "Student-Centred Diversity," featured three University of Southampton alumni sharing their unique academic and career journeys. It was held on July 25, 2025, for offer holders and applicants.
entities: BSc Business Management with a Placement Year
BSc Accounting and Finance with a year in employment
